name: freshservice
description: Reads and writes documented Freshservice REST API v2 resources, preserving legacy ticket, agent, requester, asset, and problem stream projections.

risk.read: external Freshservice API reads across documented REST API v2 JSON resources
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive delete actions are marked destructive
risk.write: creates, updates, restores, archives, cancels, and deletes Freshservice records through documented REST API v2 mutation endpoints
